original: You need to have a shield generator in order to use a shield booster.
You probably shouldn’t use a shield booster while having full shields... You might overload something.
Using another shield booster would probably destroy your shield generator.

You press the booster to the charge port on your shield generator and hear the telltale hum of rapidly discharging electrical energy. After a second, the booster beeps and blinks red before dying completely.
